title: Collapsible Travel Dog Bowl Portable Large Or Small Pet Water and Food Feeding Bowl Outdoor Easy To Carry With Hook Blue or Pink (Blue Large)
features: A Collapsible Dog and Pet Travel Bowl, Made Of Premium Silicone and Plastic with a Metal Hook, Non Toxic, Soft Texture and Easy To Collapse and Carry.
An ideal solution to keep your Dog or Pet watered and fed when out walking, Camping or Traveling.

The Small Bowl has a width of 13cm and a Height of 5.5cm, Can hold approximately 350ml of water which is just over a can of fizzy drink, it collapses to 1.5cm in Height., The Large Bowl can hold 650ml of water and is 16cm width and 6cm in height
Made with Durable silicone it makes the Bowl easy to clean, simply rinse with soapy water and soft cloth.
The Bowl opens and closes in seconds and its easy to store and carry, use the hook on a rucksack, trouser loop or leash.
UK Based Company and Customer Support
